recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure Transparency
recommendations.description: Immediately improve ESG disclosures aligned with BRSR guidelines to avoid SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions, targeting full compliance by FY26 filing deadline.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid potential ₹50-200 Cr passive fund outflows and reduce cost of capital by 20-40 bps, improving funding costs by approximately ₹10-15 Cr annually.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India enhanced disclosures leading to ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows

recommendations.title: Publish Comprehensive TCFD Report
recommendations.description: Develop and publish a bank-level TCFD report including Scope 3 financed emissions to improve ESG ratings and attract ESG-mandated investments.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential to attract ₹500-1000 Cr in ESG fund inflows, with valuation premium of 5-10%, increasing market cap by ₹100-200 Cr.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: SBI's CDP B rating and ₹3000 Cr inflows after TCFD report publication

recommendations.title: Implement Quarterly Governance Reporting
recommendations.description: Establish a robust process for SEBI quarterly corporate governance reporting to maintain regulatory compliance and investor confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid penalties and reputational damage that could lead to ₹50 Cr fund outflows, preserving investor base and reducing cost of capital.

recommendations.title: Launch ESG Transparency Communication Campaign
recommendations.description: Initiate a targeted communication campaign to highlight governance improvements and ESG initiatives, boosting trust scores and customer retention.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved trust can reduce customer churn by 5%, increasing revenue by ₹20-30 Cr annually.
